title: Beans + Rice Bowl
steps: Warm beans with any spices or onions/garlic if available.
Combine in a bowl; add any optional toppings.

title: Tuna Salad + Crackers
steps: Mix with mayo (or a little oil) and any extras.
Serve with crackers or on bread.

title: Simple Lentil Soup
steps: Simmer lentils in broth/water until tender.
Add any optional veggies/spices and simmer 10 more minutes.

title: Oatmeal with Fruit
steps: Cook oats with water or milk.
Top with fruit and any optional add-ins.
